title: pluchea paniculata var. subsimplex
intro: Pluchea paniculata var. subsimplex, also known as Chinese aster or Small White Aster, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
